title: Tanapa%20IFMIS%20Testimonial
content:
TANZANIA NATIONAL PARKS 
Ref. No. TN P /ICT /G/C/2012/2 OFFICE OF THE DIRECTOR GENERAL 
P. 0. BOX3134,ARUSHA-TANZANIA 
Certificate of Appreciation Date 18th June 2012 
This is to certify that Techno Brain has successfully implemented an Integrated Management 
Information System (IMIS) at Tanzania National Parks (TANAPA) Head Office and all the National Parks 
that come under TANAPA. TAN APA intended to fulfil the following national objectives: 
>-Conserve Areas Designated as National Parks for the future generations 
Y Be self-sustaining and generate revenues through tourism to support its core objectives and 
other government development programmes 
To accomplish this requirement we needed a highly professional IT Partner that would provide us with a 
cost effective solution. We found Techno Brain suitable and competent to implement the solution. 
Techno Brain's Integrated Management Information System included the following Modules: 
);;> Public Sector Financial Management with Fund Accounting 
);;> Gate Point of Sale (POS) Permit System 
).-POS Online Booking System 
);;> Chimps Booking System 
);-Tourism Services & Campsite System 
);-Conservation Management 
>-System Administration & Management 
>-Fleet Management 
).> Curio shop Management 
This project is successfully completed by Techno Brain. During the project, consultan ts from Techno 
Brain demonstrated high level of professionalism and thorough understanding of the requirements 
which has helped us in achieving all our objectives. 
On behalf of TANAPA management and the entire ICT team, we do appreciate and commend Techno 
Brain's service and support. 
We are satisfied with Techno Brain's technical expertise and their commitment to adhere to high 
standards, and ability to train & provide support to our staff. We appreciate the good work done by 
Techno Brain and do not have any hesitation in recommending them. 
For and on behalf of 
Tanz~~ tionalParks 
Wanna ses 
Head of ICT 
TELEPHONE: 255-27-GENERAL LINE 250347112504082 •DIRECTOR GENERAL'S LINE: 2508040 •TELEFAX. 2508216 •E-MAIL: tanapa@habari.co.tz
